description: Consolidate 3 fragmented sample management interfaces into a single unified interface on the dataset edit page. Two entry points: single S3 URI entry and flat CSV bulk upload with smart duplicate detection. Samples editable after upload. Batch editing, pagination, and Playwright E2E tests.

userStories.title: Remove dead code — delete BulkImporter.tsx
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove the unused BulkImporter component to reduce confusion.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/BulkImporter.tsx (755 lines, not imported anywhere)
Search entire codebase to verify no file imports or references BulkImporter
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
Run code-reviewer agent to verify cleanup is complete
userStories.notes: Use Explore agent to verify no references exist. BulkImporter.tsx has a JSON paste tab and CSV upload tab but is dead code — never imported.

userStories.title: Add PATCH API endpoint for single sample editing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a PATCH endpoint so admins can update individual sample fields after creation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add PATCH handler to src/app/api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/[sampleId]/route.ts
Accepts partial updates to: s3_object_key, s3_annotation_key, s3_specs_key, metadata_json, media_url
Validates at least one field is provided — returns 400 if empty body
Validates metadata_json is valid JSON if provided — returns 400 with error message if invalid
Returns updated sample record on success
Auth-protected using same JWT verifyAuth pattern as existing DELETE handler in that file
Returns 404 if sample not found or doesn't belong to this dataset
Typecheck passes
Run code-reviewer agent to verify security, validation, and error handling
userStories.notes: Read existing DELETE handler in src/app/api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/[sampleId]/route.ts for auth pattern. Use Explore agent to study the auth middleware. The file already has NextRequest + params pattern — follow it exactly.

userStories.title: Add batch PATCH API endpoint for multiple samples
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an endpoint to update the same field(s) across multiple samples at once for batch editing.
acceptanceCriteria: Add PATCH handler to src/app/api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/bulk/route.ts (alongside existing POST)
Accepts body: { sample_ids: string[], updates: { s3_object_key?, s3_annotation_key?, s3_specs_key?, metadata_json?, media_url? } }
Validates sample_ids is non-empty array
Validates all sample_ids belong to this dataset — returns error for any that don't
Validates updates has at least one field
Validates metadata_json is valid JSON if provided
Applies same partial update to all specified samples via single Supabase update with .in('id', sample_ids)
Returns: { updated: number, errors: Array<{ id: string, message: string }> }
Auth-protected using same JWT pattern as existing POST handler in that file
Typecheck passes
Run code-reviewer agent to verify security and edge cases
userStories.notes: Read existing POST handler in src/app/api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/bulk/route.ts for auth and Supabase patterns. Use Explore agent first.

userStories.title: Add duplicate detection to bulk import API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the bulk import API to skip samples that already exist in the dataset based on s3_object_key.
acceptanceCriteria: Update POST handler in src/app/api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/bulk/route.ts
Accept optional skip_duplicates: boolean in request body
When skip_duplicates is true: before inserting each chunk, query existing s3_object_key values for this dataset
Filter out rows whose s3_object_key matches an existing sample
Update response shape to include skipped count: { inserted: number, skipped: number, errors: Array<{ row: number, message: string }> }
When skip_duplicates is false or omitted, behavior unchanged (backward compatible)
Continue chunking inserts at 100 records per batch
Typecheck passes
Run code-reviewer agent to verify query efficiency and correctness
userStories.notes: Read existing POST handler to understand current chunking logic. The dedup query should fetch all existing s3_object_keys for the dataset in one query upfront, then filter client-side against each chunk.

userStories.title: Update samples GET API for server-side pagination
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the samples list API to support pagination for datasets with hundreds of samples.
acceptanceCriteria: Update GET handler in src/app/api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/route.ts
Accept optional query params: page (default 1), per_page (default 50)
Use Supabase .range() for offset-based pagination
Return response shape: { samples: DatasetSample[], total: number, page: number, per_page: number, total_pages: number }
Preserve existing presigned URL generation and format_issues count logic
When no page/per_page params provided, return all samples (backward compatible with existing DatasetUploader)
Typecheck passes
Run code-reviewer agent to verify pagination logic and backward compatibility
userStories.notes: Read existing GET handler carefully — it does presigned URL generation and format_issues counting. Make sure pagination wraps around those operations. Use Supabase .range(from, to) where from = (page-1)*per_page and to = from + per_page - 1. Use count option in Supabase query for total.

userStories.title: Update POST samples API to accept S3 URI mode
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the single sample creation API to support S3 URIs with annotation and specs keys.
acceptanceCriteria: Update POST handler in src/app/api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/route.ts to accept a new mode
New request body shape for S3 mode: { mode: 's3_uri', s3_object_key: string, s3_annotation_key?: string, s3_specs_key?: string, metadata_json?: string }
Strip s3://bucket-name/ prefix from s3_object_key if present using regex /^s3:\/\/[^/]+\//
Guess MIME type from s3_object_key extension (.mp4 → video/mp4, .mov → video/quicktime, .json → application/json, .jpg/.jpeg → image/jpeg, .png → image/png)
Insert into dataset_samples with s3_object_key, s3_annotation_key, s3_specs_key, metadata_json, mime_type
Existing modes (get-upload-url, media_url, storage upload) remain unchanged
Return created sample record
Typecheck passes
Run code-reviewer agent to verify all modes still work
userStories.notes: The POST handler already supports 3 modes. Add s3_uri as a 4th mode. The MIME guessing logic already exists in the bulk route — reuse or extract a shared helper. Use Explore agent to find existing MIME detection patterns.

userStories.title: Refactor AddSampleForm to support S3 URIs
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to add a single sample by entering its S3 URI and associated metadata fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/AddSampleForm.tsx

Form fields: S3 Object URI (required text input, validates s3:// or http(s):// prefix), S3 Annotation Key (optional text input), S3 Specs Key (optional text input), Metadata JSON (optional monospace textarea, validates JSON syntax, defaults to {})
On submit, calls POST /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples with mode 's3_uri' and the form fields
Success: shows success message, clears form, calls onSampleAdded callback to refresh parent list
Error: shows inline error message with API error details
Loading state on submit button
Terminal aesthetic: dark inputs with border-[var(--border-primary)], green accent on focus, JetBrains Mono for JSON textarea
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Run code-reviewer agent to verify form validation and API integration
userStories.notes: Use frontend-expert agent to help build the form with proper terminal aesthetic. Read existing AddSampleForm.tsx first to understand current props and callbacks. The parent CatalogEditClient.tsx passes onSampleAdded and datasetId props.

userStories.title: Build BulkCsvUploader — file upload, parse, and column mapping
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to upload a flat CSV file and see auto-detected column mappings before importing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/BulkCsvUploader.tsx
Drag-and-drop zone or file picker accepting .csv files
Client-side CSV parsing using PapaParse (already installed)
Flat CSV only — no multi-section parsing, one row = one sample

Auto-detect column mapping: columns matching s3_object_key/s3_uri/file_url/media_url/url → s3_object_key; annotation_key/s3_annotation_key/annotation → s3_annotation_key; specs_key/s3_specs_key/specs → s3_specs_key; metadata/metadata_json/meta → metadata_json
Remaining unmapped columns get merged into metadata_json as key-value pairs
S3 prefix stripping toggle: when enabled, strips s3://bucket-name/ prefix using regex /^s3:\/\/[^/]+\//
Preview table showing first 10 rows with mapped columns highlighted
Column mapping dropdowns: admin can override auto-detected mappings
Show parsed row count: 'X rows detected'
Props: { datasetId: string, onImportComplete: () => void }
Terminal aesthetic consistent with admin portal
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Run code-reviewer agent to verify CSV parsing and mapping logic
userStories.notes: Use frontend-expert agent to build this component. PapaParse is already in package.json. This story covers ONLY the upload, parse, and mapping UI — the actual import execution is US-009. Use Explore agent to study the existing import wizard at src/app/admin/catalog/import/page.tsx for PapaParse usage patterns.

userStories.title: BulkCsvUploader — duplicate detection and import execution
userStories.description: As an admin, after mapping CSV columns I want to see duplicate detection results and execute the import with progress tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/BulkCsvUploader.tsx with import execution step
After column mapping, fetch existing s3_object_key values for this dataset via GET API
Compare parsed CSV rows against existing keys to identify duplicates
Display: 'X new samples to import' and 'Y duplicates will be skipped' with collapsible list of duplicate keys
Import button triggers POST /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/bulk with skip_duplicates: true
Sends data in chunks of 100 records with progress bar showing X of Y chunks
Completion summary: 'Imported X samples. Y skipped (duplicates). Z errors.'
Errors displayed with row number and error message
Reset button to clear and start over
Calls onImportComplete callback on success to refresh parent sample list
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Run code-reviewer agent to verify dedup logic and chunked upload
userStories.notes: This extends the component from US-008. Use frontend-expert agent. The bulk API (US-004) now supports skip_duplicates. Fetch existing keys via the GET samples API to compare client-side before sending to server.

userStories.title: Build SampleEditPanel — slide-over for editing individual samples
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to click a sample and edit its fields in a slide-over panel.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/SampleEditPanel.tsx
Slide-over panel from the right side (position fixed, right: 0, dark overlay on left)
Props: { sample: DatasetSample, datasetId: string, onSave: () => void, onClose: () => void, onDelete: () => void }

Edit fields: S3 Object Key (text input, pre-filled), S3 Annotation Key (text input, pre-filled), S3 Specs Key (text input, pre-filled), Metadata JSON (monospace textarea, pre-filled with formatted JSON), Media URL (text input, pre-filled if exists)
Format JSON button that pretty-prints the metadata textarea content
Save button calls PATCH /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/[sampleId] with changed fields only
Cancel button discards changes and closes panel
Delete button with inline confirmation ('Are you sure? This cannot be undone.' with Confirm/Cancel)
Delete calls existing DELETE /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/[sampleId]
Success: calls onSave/onDelete callback, panel closes
Error: inline error message, panel stays open
Keyboard: Escape to close, Cmd+Enter to save
Slide-in animation from right, dark backdrop
Terminal aesthetic: dark panel bg, green accent, monospace for data fields
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Run code-reviewer agent to verify state management and API integration
userStories.notes: Use frontend-expert agent to build this. The PATCH endpoint is from US-002. The DELETE endpoint already exists. Read src/types/data-catalog.ts for DatasetSample interface to understand available fields.

userStories.title: Build BatchEditModal for editing multiple selected samples
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to select multiple samples and apply the same field updates to all of them.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/BatchEditModal.tsx
Props: { selectedSamples: DatasetSample[], datasetId: string, onSave: () => void, onClose: () => void }
Centered modal with dark overlay backdrop
Header: 'Edit X samples'
Same fields as SampleEditPanel but each has a checkbox to include in batch update
Only checked fields are sent to the API — unchecked fields are left unchanged
Fields start unchecked and empty — admin checks a field, then fills in the value
Apply button calls PATCH /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/bulk with sample_ids and updates
Apply button disabled until at least one field is checked and has a value
Success: calls onSave callback, modal closes
Error: shows which samples failed
Cancel button closes modal
Keyboard: Escape to close
Terminal aesthetic: dark modal bg, green accent borders
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Run code-reviewer agent to verify batch update logic
userStories.notes: Use frontend-expert agent. The batch PATCH endpoint is from US-003. This modal is opened from the batch action bar in the samples list (US-012).

userStories.title: Build SamplesList with pagination and selection
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a paginated list of samples with checkbox selection and batch action bar.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/SamplesList.tsx
Props: { datasetId: string, refreshKey: number }
Fetches samples from GET /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples with page and per_page=50 params

Table/list rows showing: checkbox, S3 object key (truncated to 60 chars), annotation key indicator (checkmark or dash), specs key indicator, metadata preview (first 2 key-value pairs), format issues badge (if any)
Click on a row opens SampleEditPanel (US-010)
Checkbox per row for selection, Select All checkbox in header (selects current page only)
When 1+ selected: batch action bar appears above list with 'X samples selected', 'Edit Selected' button (opens BatchEditModal US-011), 'Delete Selected' button (with confirmation showing count)
Delete Selected calls individual DELETE endpoints for each selected sample
Pagination controls at bottom: Previous / Page X of Y / Next buttons
Total count in component: 'Samples (147)'
Loading skeleton while fetching
Empty state: 'No samples yet. Add samples individually or import from CSV.'
Selection state maintained across page navigation (stored by sample ID)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Run code-reviewer agent to verify pagination, selection state, and component integration
userStories.notes: Use frontend-expert agent. This is the main samples display component. It integrates SampleEditPanel (US-010) and BatchEditModal (US-011). The paginated GET API is from US-005. Read existing DatasetUploader.tsx for reference on how samples are currently displayed.

userStories.title: Unified tabbed layout on dataset edit page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want the dataset edit page to have dataset details on top and a tabbed samples section below.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor src/app/admin/catalog/[id]/CatalogEditClient.tsx layout
Top section: Keep existing dataset details form (name, description, category, status) as-is
Bottom section: New tabbed samples management area with 3 tabs
Tab 1 'Samples': Renders SamplesList component (US-012) with count badge showing total
Tab 2 'Add Sample': Renders refactored AddSampleForm (US-007)
Tab 3 'Bulk Import': Renders BulkCsvUploader (US-008/009)
Tab styling: monospace text, active tab has green bottom border and bright text, inactive tabs are muted
When sample is added (Tab 2) or import completes (Tab 3), auto-switch to Tab 1 and refresh list
Remove DatasetUploader component usage from this page
Remove old AddSampleForm usage — replaced by new tabbed version
Keep the dataset details save functionality unchanged
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — navigate to /admin/catalog/[id] and verify all 3 tabs work
Run code-reviewer agent to verify component integration and no regressions
userStories.notes: Use frontend-expert agent. This is the integration story that ties everything together. Read CatalogEditClient.tsx carefully first to understand current layout and state management. The component currently renders AddSampleForm and DatasetUploader side by side — replace with tabbed interface.

userStories.title: Playwright E2E — single sample add and edit flow
userStories.description: As QA, I need E2E tests verifying single sample creation and editing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/sample-management.spec.ts

Test 1 - Add single sample: Login as admin (team@claru.ai / qweqwe123!), navigate to /admin/catalog, click a dataset, go to Add Sample tab, enter S3 URI (s3://moonvalley-annotation-platform/test/sample.mp4), enter metadata JSON ({"test": true}), submit, verify sample appears in Samples tab
Test 2 - Validation: Try submitting empty S3 URI field, verify error shown. Enter invalid JSON in metadata field, verify error shown
Test 3 - Edit sample: In Samples tab, click a sample row, verify edit panel opens with pre-filled data, modify S3 object key, click Save, verify list updates with new value
Test 4 - Delete sample: Click a sample, click Delete in edit panel, confirm deletion, verify sample removed from list
Test 5 - Keyboard shortcuts: Open edit panel, press Escape, verify panel closes
Use Playwright MCP browser tools (browser_navigate, browser_snapshot, browser_click, browser_type) for test development
Take screenshots at key steps
Typecheck passes
Run code-reviewer agent to verify test assertions
userStories.notes: Dev server runs on localhost:3001 (port 3000 may be in use). Admin credentials: team@claru.ai / qweqwe123!. Use Playwright MCP to manually verify flows first, then codify as spec file.

userStories.title: Playwright E2E — CSV bulk import and duplicate detection
userStories.description: As QA, I need E2E tests verifying CSV upload, column mapping, duplicate detection, and import execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Add to tests/e2e/sample-management.spec.ts or create tests/e2e/bulk-import.spec.ts
Test 1 - CSV upload: Login, navigate to dataset edit page, go to Bulk Import tab, upload a test CSV file with 5 rows, verify preview table shows mapped columns and row count
Test 2 - Column mapping: Verify auto-detected column mappings are correct for a known CSV format, verify admin can override a mapping via dropdown
Test 3 - Duplicate detection: Upload a CSV where some rows already exist in the dataset, verify duplicate count shown, verify 'X new / Y duplicates' messaging
Test 4 - Import execution: Click Import, verify progress indicator appears, verify completion summary shows correct counts, verify new samples appear in Samples tab
Test 5 - Re-import same CSV: Upload same CSV again, verify all rows detected as duplicates, verify 0 new samples message
Create a test fixture CSV file at tests/fixtures/test-samples.csv with known data
Use Playwright MCP browser tools for test development
Typecheck passes
Run code-reviewer agent to verify test coverage
userStories.notes: Create the test CSV fixture with columns: s3_uri, annotation_key, specs_key, type, category, subcategory. Use browser_file_upload MCP tool for CSV upload. Dev server on localhost:3001.

userStories.title: Playwright E2E — batch editing, batch delete, and pagination
userStories.description: As QA, I need E2E tests verifying batch operations and pagination.
acceptanceCriteria: Add to existing test file or create tests/e2e/batch-operations.spec.ts
Test 1 - Selection: Select 3 samples via checkboxes, verify batch action bar shows '3 samples selected', deselect one, verify count updates to 2
Test 2 - Select All: Click Select All checkbox, verify all samples on current page selected, click again to deselect all
Test 3 - Batch edit: Select 2 samples, click Edit Selected, check metadata_json field, enter new JSON value, click Apply, verify both samples updated
Test 4 - Batch delete: Select 2 samples, click Delete Selected, confirm in dialog, verify samples removed and count decremented
Test 5 - Pagination: For a dataset with 50+ samples, verify pagination controls visible, click Next, verify different samples shown, verify page indicator updates
Use Playwright MCP browser tools for test development
Take screenshots at key interaction points
Typecheck passes
Run code-reviewer agent to verify test assertions and coverage
userStories.notes: These tests require a dataset with enough samples for pagination (50+). May need to bulk import samples first as a test setup step. Dev server on localhost:3001.
